evidence.description: Current product surface, boundaries, examples, and license notice.
Current implemented, optional, planned, and external-gated status.
Repeatable release-readiness validation sequence and external gates.
Dataset metadata fixture for derived process artifacts.
Reproducibility manifest fixture for local tool/file evidence.
Most recent roadmap track final verification evidence.

external_gates.name: GitHub release publication
external_gates.reason: Requires maintainer tag/release approval and final changelog review.

external_gates.name: Hugging Face dataset publication
external_gates.reason: Requires credentials, terms review, and human approval before upload.

external_gates.name: Zenodo or OSF deposit
external_gates.reason: Requires registry credentials, metadata review, and manual publication.

external_gates.name: Live FYI/archive pulls
external_gates.reason: Network/source availability and source snapshot capture are outside repo-local proof.

external_gates.name: Native Mojo/MAX release certification
external_gates.reason: Requires available Modular toolchain and passing native format/test/build checks.

package_scope: Code, schemas, ontology, SHACL/SKOS vocabularies, documentation, small examples, and release evidence for FOI-O NZ.

publication_artifacts.description: Short methods paper for the release package.
publication_artifacts.name: methods paper

rights_notice: MIT applies to code, schemas, ontology, examples, and documentation in this repository. Source FYI/archive content retains its original rights and platform terms and is not republished by this release package.

validation_commands.command: uv run ruff check src tests scripts
uv run ruff format --check src tests scripts
